name: Aquila Rift
author: Zoink Doink

placementContext.reason: Aquila Rift represents a new era of short, hyper-difficult levels, combining Zoink's legendary layout design with Renn's atmospheric and polished decoration to create a unique Top 1 contender.

description: A high-detail collaboration that transforms a classic layout into a visual and mechanical powerhouse, Aquila Rift features intense wave and ship segments within a beautifully crafted space-themed environment.
